# Powering America’s Arsenal: Anduril Expands Rocket Motor Production with Additional $43.7M in Defense Production Act Title III Funding

Anduril receives an additional $43.7M in Defense Production Act Title III funding to expand domestic solid rocket motor production capacity at its Mississippi facility, reinforcing America’s munitions industrial base.
